name: step1-portable-bootstrap
title: Step 1: Portable Bootstrap & PotPvP Defaults
description: 强制便携化 + 删 APPDATA + 写权限自检 + 目录砍 config 层 + 预置 PotPvP Profile + 首次启动引导 + 日志清理(30天)
creator: Sakyvo
notes: Decisions come from a 14-round grill-with-docs session. CONTEXT.md and ADR-0001/0002 capture the rationale; this task captures the executable scope. The predefined PotPvP Profile is ported from C:/Users/ASUS/Desktop/obscfg with FPS=360, CQP=25 overrides.
